name: Ribbed Ceramic Table Lamp Brown/Oatmeal - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Farmhouse Accent, 40W Max, ETL Listed
description:
Light up any space in decorative style with this Ribbed Ceramic Table Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This beautiful table lamp features a brown ceramic base with a ribbed design and an oatmeal-hue fabric empire shade. The on/off light setting with a turn-knob rotary switch allows for easy functionality. Place it on any side table, console or sideboard for stylish, warm lighting.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
